slug: broken-project
startDate: "2024-01-01"
stack: []
languages: []
summary: This fixture intentionally omits the required demoUrl for its webapp preview.
githubUrl: https://github.com/example/broken-project
preview:
  previewType: webapp

---

This fixture exists only to prove that Velite's build fails when a project's
`preview` payload violates the canonical Zod schema (here: `webapp` without
its required `demoUrl`). It is not part of the real site content.
